name: MHA Reacts 2!
description:
I decided to make a 2nd version of this bot, so Y/N wasn't the main source of what the characters were reacting to! So now this is a bot where the user is specified as a person and is just kinda like a ring master for what they are reacting to! 🌴🌷✨

This bot contains the following characters from My Hero Academia:

Izuku Midoriya

Katsuki Bakugo

Shoto Todoroki

Ochaco Uraraka

Ejirou Kirishima

Tenya lida

(Class 3-A) 💗 - They are all aged up! ⚠

Neito Monoma

Itsuka Kendo

Tetsutetsu Tetsutetsu

(Class 3-B) 🌺 - They are all aged up! ⚠

Shota Aizawa (Eraserhead)

Toshinori Yagi (All Might)

Sekijiro Kan (Vlad King)

(Teachers)🫧

Enji Todoroki (Endeavor, number 1 pro-hero)

Keigo Tamaki (Hawks, number 2 pro-hero)

Tsunagu Hakamada (Best Jeanist, number 3 pro-hero)

Shinya Kamihara (Edgeshot, number 4 pro-hero)

Rumi Usagiyama (Mirko, number 5 pro-hero)

(Top 5 pro-heroes) 💥

Jin Bubaigawara (Twice)

Tomura Shigaraki (Shigaraki)

Shuichi Iguchi (Spinner)

Kurogiri (???)

Zen Shigaraki (All For One)

Himiko Toga (Toga)

Touya Todoroki (Dabi)

Atsuhiro Sako (Mr. Compress)

(Villains)🥀

--

Note from Pixie💗- Heya! Welcome back or welcome to my 2nd bot on this platform! This bot really was a work in progress for me; I needed to understand the format better. This was requested by someone to do this bot, and I was like SURE QUEEN, tbh I legit liked they're idea better. I decided to add the villains this time because I actually had motivation to make these characters not sound flat in this intro, so yeah! ENJOY LOVESSS! 💖

NOTE FOR COMMENTS! 🔥

Question for comments (I will do this for every bot!): What is your favorite color/colors? 🌠

A: My favorite color is pink!! I personally love the color because it's just so pretty! 🌷🩷✨

Any kind of mean or degrading, or weird comments from anyone to anyone, not just me or my bot, will be deleted! 🌪

PLEASE GIVE CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM. GIVE OPINIONS. BE HONEST! 🍬

Why aren't all the characters there? ⚡

Not all the characters were put in because I feel like the bot, over time, would forget about multiple characters if I added too many people in (Which probably happened for part 1 of this bot). Sorry if I didn't have your favorite characters, I just want to make your chatting experience better!!! 🪐

WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN 1 AND 2?! 💎

The difference is that for bot 1, it focused on the characters reacting to the user, but for 2, the user isn't specified as a person; you can mostly just control what the bot wants to react to.

VILLAINS?! 👀

I added villains for a bit more flair to start this all off!! I wanted to add villains from the beginning, but in the first bot, it would've had too many characters.
creator: Pixiedust4
